validated_patterns: AI founders with active enterprise pilots respond to procurement-delay language.
A fixed-price manual readiness review is easier to validate than a software product.
rejected_patterns: Pre-procurement founders understand the issue but do not show immediate willingness to pay.
lessons: Lead with active deal delay, not generic compliance.
Ask for payment or a booked call before creating reusable templates.
strong_segments: Small B2B AI vendors with active enterprise pilots
weak_segments: AI vendors without current procurement pressure
money_dna_updates: Alan can validate this opportunity fastest through founder DMs and buyer-language synthesis.
next_biases: Prefer opportunities where Alan can name an active buyer event and offer a manual review within 48 hours.
